references.role: global Licorn kitchen identity and final hero context
references.prompt: Use only to preserve the Licorn kitchen island, materials, lighting, and overall identity. Do not force wide framing when a macro food texture is requested.

references.role: overhead countertop identity for prep, folding, shaping, and breading
references.prompt: Use only for overhead countertop composition and hand actions on the island.

references.role: induction stovetop context for risotto and frying
references.prompt: Use only for close stovetop pan actions. The induction surface must not show flames, coals, or glowing gas burners.

references.role: large pan shape for risotto and high-sided frying pan
references.prompt: Use as shape reference for the cooking vessel only; do not add extra burners or flames.

references.role: spatula for risotto stirring, folding, and spreading
references.prompt: Use as tool reference for one clear stir, fold, or spread action at a time.

references.role: spoon for serving nudge and cooled risotto scoop
references.prompt: Use as spoon shape reference only when a serving nudge or scoop is visible.

references.role: Licorn character identity for visible hands and final satisfied presence
references.prompt: Use to preserve character identity; do not re-invent the character design from text.

references.role: top-down visible hands pose for prep, folding, shaping, and breading
references.prompt: Use only to keep hands readable in overhead food-action shots.

references.role: safe three-quarter hand presence for lowering arancini into oil
references.prompt: Use to keep the frying hand/tool pose stable and safe; no oil splashing onto hands.

references.role: final satisfied character pose at the kitchen island
references.prompt: Use only for the final shot where the dish stays foreground and the character supports the scene.

references.role: satisfied expression for final hero shot
references.prompt: Use for a warm satisfied expression only; no speech or exaggerated performance.

references.role: uploaded final arancini bowl photo for serving composition and crumb color
references.prompt: Use the attached final dish photo to preserve the rustic bowl, round arancini pile, golden breadcrumb texture, and nearby green salad leaves.

references.role: uploaded cut-open arancino photo for interior structure
references.prompt: Use the cut-open plated arancino area in the attached photo to preserve the creamy rice, peas, pale mozzarella center, and thin golden shell.

references.role: cooled risotto state ready to scoop and shape
references.prompt: Generate a vertical 9:16 close overhead image in the Licorn kitchen: pale creamy risotto with green peas and parsley is spread thin on a plate or shallow tray, glossy but cooling into a matte moldable texture. No text, no hands, no final fried arancini.

references.role: sealed mozzarella-stuffed rice ball topology before breading
references.prompt: Generate a vertical 9:16 macro overhead image in the Licorn kitchen: a smooth 6 cm pale risotto ball with green pea specks is sealed around a hidden mozzarella cube. Show one ball whole and one small cutaway diagram-like food state is not allowed; no exposed cheese on the outside, no breading, no frying oil, no text.

Generate a vertical 9:16 close overhead image in the Licorn kitchen: several round 6 cm arancini coated in pale coarse breadcrumbs rest on a tray with a few loose crumbs. The surface is dry, rough, pebbly, and fully covers the rice. No golden frying color yet, no exposed filling, no text.

Generate a vertical 9:16 macro food image in the Licorn kitchen: round arancini with crisp golden breadcrumb crust, uneven toasted speckles, tiny oil droplets, and dry crumb texture. No burnt black patches, no tomato sauce, no text.

references.role: cut-open arancino interior with peas and mozzarella
references.prompt: Generate a vertical 9:16 macro food image in the Licorn kitchen: one fried arancino is cut open, showing a thin crisp golden shell, creamy white risotto with green peas and parsley, and a soft central mozzarella core with a short realistic stretch. No tomato sauce, no long pizza pull, no text.
